iklimlendirme.title: Air Conditioning

tiger.label: Air Handling Unit
tiger.desc: An air handling unit solution featuring modular construction, high energy-efficient components, and quiet operation performance in the 500 – 125,000 m³/h airflow range.

dolphin.label: Pool Dehumidification Unit
dolphin.desc: Prevents moisture damage to building structures in indoor pools while maximizing user comfort. Stands out with its high energy efficiency, long-lasting construction, and quiet operation.

caracal.label: Heat Recovery
caracal.desc: Provides controlled air conditioning to meet fresh air requirements and improve existing air quality in offices, schools, hotels, hospitals, and social spaces.

iklimlendirme.ctaDesc: Our technical team is ready to provide you with the most suitable air conditioning solution.

hound.desc: A damper series designed to provide maximum control and safety at the most critical points of ventilation and fire safety systems.

havaDagitimi.heroDesc: Grille, diffuser, anemostats, and louver solutions.

alpaca.label: Grilles, Diffusers, etc.
alpaca.desc: different models with tailored solutions for all air distribution needs.

havaFiltrasyonu.title: Air Filtration

scallop.label: Filter Series

aksesuarlar.title: Accessories
aksesuarlar.ctaTitle: Looking for the right accessory for your project?

accessories.name: Spring Vibration Isolator
accessories.description: Spring Vibration Isolators are used in HVAC systems and mechanical equipment installations to reduce low-level vibrations that could be transmitted from the system to the floor or surrounding environment.

accessories.name: AE SF Mounting Feet
accessories.description: Mounting Feet are high-strength mounting elements designed to securely fasten fans to the floor or supporting surface in accordance with project requirements.

accessories.name: AE PM Wire Guard
accessories.description: Wire Guards are protective grilles manufactured from high-strength steel wire, designed to ensure user safety on the suction or discharge side of fan systems and to prevent foreign object ingress into the operating area.

accessories.name: AE IC Inlet Cone
accessories.description: AE IC Series Inlet Cones are designed to optimize airflow on the suction side of fans, reduce air turbulence, and increase system efficiency.

accessories.name: AE CF Counter Flange
accessories.description: AE CF Series Counter Flanges are high-temperature resistant connection equipment used to connect fans to the duct system and ensure airtightness.

accessories.name: AE FJF Flexible Joint Counter Flange
accessories.description: AE FJF Series Flexible Joint Counter Flanges are special connection elements designed to prevent vibration transmission between fan and duct systems, reduce expansion effects, and provide a quieter operating environment.

accessories.name: AE FJF F400 Class Flexible Joint Counter Flange
accessories.description: AE FJF Series F400 Class Flexible Joint Counter Flanges are designed to provide a flexible, secure, and airtight connection between fan and duct systems in fire-resistant applications.

accessories.name: AE FJ2F Dual Counter Flange Flexible Joint
accessories.description: Dual Counter Flange Flexible Joints are highly flexible connection elements equipped with counter flanges on both ends, designed to absorb vibration, expansion, and installation misalignments between fan and duct systems.

accessories.name: AE FJ2F F400 Dual Counter Flange Flexible Joint
accessories.description: AE FJ2F-HR Series are dual counter flange flexible joint solutions with high temperature resistance, designed for use in systems requiring fire resistance.

accessories.name: AE S-D100 Circular Silencer
accessories.description: AE S-D100 Series Circular Silencers are high-performance acoustic control elements designed to reduce noise levels and improve comfort conditions in ventilation systems.

accessories.name: AE RS Rectangular Duct Type Silencer
accessories.description: AE RS Series Rectangular Duct Type Silencers are high-efficiency sound insulation elements designed to reduce airflow-generated noise levels and enhance acoustic comfort in duct systems.

accessories.name: AE-SS Socket Silencer
accessories.description: AE SS Series Socket Silencers are acoustic control accessories optionally provided for projects requiring noise reduction particularly on the inlet side.

accessories.name: AE-V Guide Vane
accessories.description: AE V Series Guide Vanes are auxiliary aerodynamic elements designed to optimize airflow, reduce turbulence, and ensure uniform flow distribution in fan and duct systems.

accessories.name: AE-OC Outlet Cap
accessories.description: AE OC Series Outlet Caps are durable structural elements designed to protect against outdoor conditions at the discharge points of fan systems and to maintain system performance.

accessories.name: AE-DFC Rectangular Flexible Connector
accessories.description: AE DFC Series Rectangular Flexible Connectors are durable connection elements designed to provide vibration isolation, prevent sound transmission, and enhance airtightness in duct systems.

accessories.name: AE-AF Roof Adapter Frame
accessories.description: AE AF Series Roof Adapter Frames are high-strength connection elements designed to ensure safe, stable, and airtight installation of fans and other HVAC equipment on rooftops.

accessories.name: AE FRS Flat Roof Socket
accessories.description: AE FRS Series Flat Roof Sockets are auxiliary structural elements designed for safe, insulated, and stable installation of fans and HVAC equipment in flat roof applications.

accessories.name: AE-CB Roof Connection Box
accessories.description: AE CB Series Roof Connection Boxes are auxiliary structural elements designed for safe and stable installation of fan systems and duct connections.

accessories.name: AE-EH Duct Type Electric Heater
accessories.description: AE EH Series Duct Type Electric Heaters are compact and high-efficiency heater units developed for comfort-oriented applications such as heating fresh air in ventilation systems.

accessories.name: Safety Switch
accessories.description: The Safety Switch is a control element with high protection standards, designed for the safe activation and deactivation of fans and other electrical equipment.

accessories.name: Protected Safety Switch
accessories.description: The Protected Safety Switch is a durable control element designed to provide safe on/off control of electrical equipment while offering protection against environmental factors.

accessories.name: Single Phase Speed Controller
accessories.description: The Single Phase Speed Controller is a user-friendly control unit designed to continuously and precisely adjust the rotation speed of fans with voltage-controlled single-phase asynchronous motors.

accessories.name: Frequency Inverter
accessories.description: The Frequency Inverter is a next-generation drive unit developed to increase energy efficiency and provide optimum speed control in motorized fan and ventilation systems.

accessories.name: Pressurization Control Panel
accessories.description: The Pressurization Control Panel is an advanced control unit with frequency inverter, designed to ensure automatic and optimized operation of fans in pressurization systems.

accessories.name: Differential Pressure Sensor
accessories.description: The Differential Pressure Sensor is a high-precision control element designed to measure and control air pressure differences in ventilation and filtration systems.

accessories.name: Differential Pressure Sensor PI (0-10V Output)
accessories.description: The Differential Pressure Sensor + PI Control is an advanced sensor system developed to precisely monitor and automatically regulate air pressure or airflow in ventilation systems.

accessories.name: Duct Type Smoke Sensor
accessories.description: The Duct Type Smoke Sensor is a high-sensitivity detection device designed for early-stage detection of smoke and combustion products in the air within ventilation and air conditioning systems.

accessories.name: G4 Panel Filter
accessories.description: G4 Panel Filters are high-efficiency pre-filters designed to capture coarse particles, dust, and pollutants from the air in ventilation and air conditioning systems.

accessories.name: G2-G3 Panel Filter
accessories.description: G2-G3 Panel Filters are reliable pre-filter solutions designed to capture medium and large particles in ventilation and air conditioning systems.

accessories.name: G2 Metal Grease Filter
accessories.description: G2 Metal Grease Filters are high-durability filtration elements designed specifically for capturing grease vapor and large particles in ventilation and kitchen exhaust systems.

accessories.name: G2-G3 Metal Grease Filter
accessories.description: G2-G3 Metal Grease Filters are durable filtration solutions designed for effective capture of grease vapor and large particles in ventilation and kitchen exhaust systems.

titresimVeSesIzolasyon.title: Vibration & Sound Insulation
titresimVeSesIzolasyon.heroDesc: Silencers, rubber pads, and vibration isolators.

roo.label: Silencers, Rubber Pads, Vibration Isolators
roo.desc: different models with tailored solutions for vibration and sound insulation needs.

banyoFanlari.title: SEAHORSE
banyoFanlari.subtitle: Bathroom Fans
banyoFanlari.intro: Bathroom fans, used for the rapid extraction of odors and steam in small to medium-sized spaces such as bathrooms, toilets, and pantries, play an important role in both hygiene and comfort.

models.name: Seahorse AP
models.description: The AP Decorative Bathroom Fan combines aesthetics and functionality in living spaces with its elegant design harmonized with modern architecture and high-performance construction.

models.name: Seahorse RP V1
models.description: The RP V1 Adjustable Ceiling Mounted Exhaust Fan is the ideal ventilation solution designed for modern living spaces with its stylish design and advanced mounting mechanism.

models.name: Seahorse RP V2
models.type: Ceiling Mounted Bathroom V2 Exhaust Fan
models.description: Standing out with its modern design and powerful performance, the RP V2 Wide Front Panel Exhaust Fan is designed for living spaces where both aesthetics and functionality are priorities.

models.name: Heron RH
models.description: Specially designed for air exhaust applications requiring rooftop installation.

models.name: Heron RHS
models.type: Horizontal Discharge External Motor Centrifugal Roof Fan
models.description: For applications requiring high temperature and contaminated air exhaust.

models.name: Heron RV
models.description: High efficiency in applications requiring vertical air exhaust.

models.name: Heron RVS
models.type: Vertical Discharge External Motor Centrifugal Roof Fan
models.description: High temperature and heavy steam air exhaust.

models.name: Heron AH
models.description: Fresh air supply or exhaust in large-volume spaces.

models.name: Heron AVH
models.description: Lidded axial roof fan.

damperler.title: HOUND
damperler.subtitle: Dampers
damperler.intro: Novves HOUND series dampers are designed to provide maximum control and safety at the most critical points of ventilation and fire safety systems.

models.name: Hound SD M24
models.type: Shaft Smoke Damper with 24V Servo Motor
models.description: Developed for safe air exhaust in fire and smoke control systems, offering EN 17051 Class-C leakage classification and servo motor compatibility.

models.name: Hound AL
models.description: An aesthetically designed louver system that directs airflow at air inlet and outlet points and provides protection against external elements.

models.name: Hound CRD
models.description: An automatic-opening pressure relief damper for overpressure control and system component protection.

dumanIsiTahliyeFanlari.title: DRAGONFLY
dumanIsiTahliyeFanlari.subtitle: Smoke & Heat Extraction Fans
dumanIsiTahliyeFanlari.intro: A smoke and heat extraction fan series with F300 class fire resistance certification, designed to withstand 300°C temperatures for 2 hours.

models.name: Dragonfly T
models.type: Cased Axial Smoke & Heat Extraction Fan
models.description: A high-temperature resistant cased axial fan designed for effective extraction of smoke and hot air during fire events. EN 12101-3 certified.

models.name: Dragonfly R
models.type: Axial Roof Type Smoke & Heat Extraction Fan
models.description: A high-temperature resistant rooftop fan ensuring rapid, safe, and effective extraction of smoke and hot air during fire events. EN 12101-3 certified.

models.name: Dragonfly C
models.type: Axial Plenum Smoke & Heat Extraction Fan
models.description: A high-temperature resistant and low-noise cabinet type unit developed for safe extraction of smoke and high-temperature air during fire events. EN 12101-3 certified.

models.name: Dragonfly JAU
models.description: Designed for smoke extraction and air circulation in car parks, tunnels, and enclosed spaces, with high temperature resistance. EN 12101-3 certified.

models.name: Dragonfly JAR
models.description: Developed for smoke extraction, ventilation, and air circulation in enclosed car parks and large-volume indoor spaces, bidirectional. Low noise level and high performance.

models.name: Dragonfly JR
models.description: Specially designed for smoke extraction and emergency ventilation in demanding indoor volumes such as enclosed car parks, tunnels, and fire zones. EN 12101-3 certified.

models.name: Owl RER
models.description: A metal-bladed axial fan solution specially designed for wall-mounted installation, featuring a durable construction and adjustable speed.

models.name: Owl CER
models.description: A compact and high-efficiency metal-bladed axial fan model specially designed for circular wall-mounted installation.

models.name: Owl RWA
models.description: An axial fan solution featuring a high-efficiency aerofoil blade design, suitable for rectangular wall-mounted installation.

models.name: Owl CWA
models.description: A compact axial fan solution suitable for circular wall-mounted installation, featuring a lightweight yet durable aerofoil blade structure.

ecFanlar.title: HUMMINGBIRD
ecFanlar.subtitle: EC Fans
ecFanlar.intro: The Hummingbird series offers roof and duct type fan solutions that combine high performance with energy savings through EC motor technology.

models.name: Hummingbird RRV
models.description: A vertical discharge roof fan solution developed for modern buildings, operating with high-efficiency EC motors. With smart control options, low energy consumption, and quiet operation, it stands out in comfort and industrial ventilation applications.

models.name: Hummingbird DRB
models.description: A high-efficiency EC motor rectangular duct fan solution designed for use in modern ventilation systems. With its compact structure, quiet operation, and automation system integration capability, it is reliably preferred in comfort and industrial applications.

endustriyelFanlar.title: NAUTILUS
endustriyelFanlar.subtitle: Industrial Centrifugal Fans
endustriyelFanlar.intro: Combining high performance with energy savings, industrial fans offer a powerful and efficient ventilation solution with backward-curved blade design and direct-drive motor configuration.

models.name: Nautilus LPF
models.description: An industrial fan combining high performance with energy savings.

models.name: Nautilus Silence
models.description: The NAUTILUS Silence Series are centrifugal fans that operate with high efficiency in systems requiring low-pressure air transfer, featuring a compact structure and direct-drive design.

exproofFanlar.title: BEAR
exproofFanlar.subtitle: Explosion-Proof Fans
exproofFanlar.intro: The Bear series fans are Ex-Proof fan solutions designed for use in explosive and flammable gas environments.

models.name: Bear EX-REB
models.description: Ex-Proof, designed for safe ventilation in explosive gas environments. High safety standards, frequency-controlled operation, ATEX zone compatible.

models.name: Bear EX-T
models.description: Safe air transfer in explosive environments, balanced impeller design. For industrial applications with fire and spark risks.

models.name: Bear EX-RRH
models.type: Horizontal Discharge Roof Type Explosion-Proof Centrifugal Fan
models.description: Specially designed for applications requiring rooftop horizontal exhaust. ATEX Zone 1 and Zone 2.

models.name: Bear EX-RRV
models.type: Vertical Discharge Roof Type Explosion-Proof Centrifugal Fan
models.description: High-pressure air exhaust, long-lasting outdoor resistance.

models.name: Bear EX-BP
models.description: A fan solution with modular plenum structure, offering powerful and quiet operation.

models.name: Bear EX-C
models.description: Quiet operation, easy maintenance, ATEX compliance.

models.name: Bear LPF
models.description: Safe air exhaust in environments containing explosive gases or vapors.

models.name: Bear R
models.description: Designed to meet the natural ventilation and exhaust needs of large-volume structures.

models.name: Bear W
models.description: Flame-proof, ATEX compliant, high performance.

havuzNemAlmaSantrali.title: DOLPHIN
havuzNemAlmaSantrali.subtitle: Pool Dehumidification Unit
havuzNemAlmaSantrali.intro: Developed by NOVVES, the Dolphin Series Pool Dehumidification Units prevent moisture damage to building structures in indoor pools while maximizing user comfort. Standing out with its high energy efficiency, long-lasting construction, and quiet operation, the Dolphin Series is the professional choice in pool climate control solutions.

hucreliFanlar.title: TURTLE
hucreliFanlar.subtitle: Plenum Fans
hucreliFanlar.intro: The Turtle Series plenum fans can be used for both fresh air supply and exhaust air extraction. Thanks to their compact structure, they offer easy direct floor mounting, while the rock wool filling between inner walls provides effective acoustic insulation.

models.name: Turtle B
models.description: A belt-driven cabinet type fan model offering reliable and quiet solutions in systems requiring high-volume air transfer.

models.name: Turtle BP
models.description: A high-performance cabinet type fan model offering quiet, efficient, and compact air solutions.

models.name: Turtle BPA
models.description: An industrial ventilation solution offering high-efficiency and quiet operation performance with its plenum type structure and backward-curved centrifugal fan technology.

models.name: Turtle F
models.description: A plug-type double-inlet cabinet type fan model standing out with its quiet and efficient operation in systems requiring low-pressure air transfer.

models.name: Turtle A
models.description: Compact axial cabinet type fan solutions designed for systems with high-volume air transfer requirements.

isiGeriKazanimCihazlari.title: CARACAL
isiGeriKazanimCihazlari.subtitle: Heat Recovery Units
isiGeriKazanimCihazlari.intro: The Caracal series provides controlled air conditioning to meet fresh air requirements and improve existing air quality in offices, schools, hotels, hospitals, business centers, shopping malls, performance venues, and cafeterias.

caracalD.title: Caracal D
caracalD.description: The Caracal D Series (Heat Recovery Unit) is a compact and high-performance solution developed to refresh indoor air while increasing energy efficiency. With its durable construction and user-friendly control panel, it provides comfortable and sustainable ventilation.

models.name: Koi CB
models.description: The Novves KOI-CB Series Circular Duct Fans offer compact and high-performance solutions developed for duct-type ventilation needs.

models.name: Koi RB
models.description: The Novves KOI-RB Series Rectangular Duct Fans are specially developed for high-performance air transfer in industrial and commercial buildings.

models.name: Koi REB
models.description: The KOI-REB Series External Motor Duct Fans are specially designed for ventilation applications requiring high temperature resistance.

models.name: Koi X
models.description: The KOI-X Series Mixed Flow Duct Fan is designed to deliver maximum efficiency especially in comfort areas, with its compact structure, quiet operation, and dual-speed motor option.

klimaSantralleri.title: TIGER
klimaSantralleri.subtitle: Air Handling Units
klimaSantralleri.intro: A modular, efficiency-oriented air handling unit solution developed for high-performance ventilation and air conditioning needs. It stands out with its wide airflow range, high energy-efficient components, and quiet operation performance.

kovanTipiAksiyalFanlar.title: MARLIN
kovanTipiAksiyalFanlar.subtitle: Cased Axial Fans
kovanTipiAksiyalFanlar.intro: The Marlin series cased axial fans are used for fresh air supply, exhaust, or as duct fans, as well as serving as pressurization fans to prevent smoke from entering escape routes such as stairwells and elevator shafts during fire events.

models.name: Marlin
models.description: The Novves MARLIN Series Cased Axial Fan is a solution that combines powerful performance, installation flexibility, and energy efficiency in systems requiring high airflow.

models.name: Marlin B
models.description: Bifurcated axial fan.

models.name: Butterfly B
models.description: The Butterfly B Series Kitchen Type Fan is a durable and high-efficiency ventilation solution developed for heavy steam, grease, and odor extraction in industrial and commercial kitchens. With its advanced filtration system, quiet operation, and long-lasting construction, it is ideal for professional kitchens.

siginakFanlari.title: FOX
siginakFanlari.subtitle: Shelter Fans
siginakFanlari.intro: The Fox series has been developed for shelters built to provide protection against radiation, nuclear, biological, and chemical threats or natural disasters.

models.name: Fox D
models.description: The FOX D Series Duct Type Shelter Fan is a durable and reliable solution with high filtration capacity, developed specifically for shelter and safe area ventilation needs.

models.name: Fox C
models.description: The FOX C Series Cabinet Type Shelter Fan is a professional ventilation solution specially developed for areas requiring high security, suitable for quiet operation, and equipped with a powerful filtration system.
